scope: Algebra I foundation lesson content correctness
findings: PEMDAS is stated with the correct rank structure: P, E, MD (left-to-right), AS (left-to-right).
Worked example 8 + 2 × (3 + 1)² is evaluated correctly to 40 with one rule per step.
Same-level trap for M/D is demonstrated correctly: 24 ÷ 4 × 2 = 12, not 3.
Same-level trap for A/S is demonstrated correctly: 10 + 24 − 4 = 30, with left-to-right reading.
Pause prompts have visually distinct answer-reveal slides showing every step.
release_notes: Foundation math only; no AP, College Board, or accreditation claims.
